---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Teaching Experience

**Teaching Assistant — Mathematics for Economists** — Department of Economics, KNUST *(Nov 2023 – Aug 2024)*

**High School Economics Teacher** — One Time Educational Consult, Kumasi *(Aug 2023 – Jul 2024)*

## Mentoring

- **UST Info Hub Facilitator** *(2022/2023)* — advised 200+ prospective students on university applications.
- **Literacy Impact Programme Mentor** *(Apr – Dec 2023)* — led literacy tutorials for basic-school pupils in Kumasi.
